channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inflation reaches highest point since 2023
item.description: Gasoline prices contributed to inflation rising to a near three-year high in April. Consumer prices increased 3.8% year-over-year.

item.title: Trump to Visit China; Iran War's Impact on Inflation
item.description: President Trump is traveling to Beijing for a state visit with President Xi Jinping. An upcoming inflation report will detail the effects of conflict in Iran.

item.title: Three Teenagers Compete in World Series of Birding
item.description: A team of high school birders, known as The Pete Dunnelins, will participate in a statewide competition to identify the most bird species.

item.title: Immigration Crackdown's Economic Impact
item.description: A study indicates ICE enforcement and deportation concerns negatively impacted local economies and employment among undocumented workers.
